Title: IWS - Verify configuration resets to default on factory reset
2. IWS device is commissioned and connected.
3. Device has non-default configuration (custom hostname, LED settings, detection zones, network settings, etc.).
Preconditions: 1. Document the current non-default configuration values.

Title: 2. Perform a factory reset on the IWS device (via QPM, device web interface, or hardware button).
3. Wait for the device to complete the reset and come back online.
4. Review all configuration values on the device.
Preconditions: 1. All configuration values return to factory defaults.

Title: 2. The hostname reverts to the default.
3. Network settings revert to defaults (DHCP or default static).
4. LED settings, detection zones, and sensor configuration revert to defaults.
5. The device requires re-commissioning after factory reset.
